official_site_search_notes: Built In discovery result showed Arcadia Senior Data Analyst reposted within the current day window; official Arcadia Lever posting and application form loaded and matched the same role.
job_description:
# Senior Data Analyst
Company: Arcadia
Source: Official Lever posting
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Freshness source: Built In discovery result showed reposted within 1 day
URL: https://jobs.lever.co/arcadia/0b2c9908-a2f6-46a0-82ef-8c8275a08b3b
Apply: https://jobs.lever.co/arcadia/0b2c9908-a2f6-46a0-82ef-8c8275a08b3b/apply

## Highlights
- Remote senior data analyst role at a healthcare data platform serving providers and payers.
- Focuses on healthcare customer insights, population health analytics, customer datasets, data validation, dashboards, and client-facing analytics.
- Requires healthcare data experience, claims or clinical data, value-based care, advanced SQL, data modeling, and BI tools.
- Preferred tools include dbt, Redshift, Snowflake, Looker, QuickSight, Tableau, Power BI, FHIR, AWS, Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and Python.
strengths: Strong healthcare data, claims/clinical, payer/provider, population health, SQL, BI, and data validation alignment.
Official Lever application form is live and user-visible.
Value-based care/customer analytics maps well to healthcare reporting and stakeholder communication.
gaps: dbt, GitHub/Jenkins, FHIR, AWS, and Python should not be overstated unless already supported.
Client-facing value-based care SME expectations may be a stretch depending on Swagatika's exact prior exposure.
notes: Apply first/if time. Tailor toward healthcare claims/clinical data, SQL, reporting validation, data modeling support, customer analytics, payer/provider context, and stakeholder-ready BI outputs.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | Claims & Clinical Analytics | SQL Data Quality
